src/lib/components/Accordion.react.js.description:
Accordion is a wrapper for the Carbon Accordion component.
Used for organizing content in collapsible panels.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the accordion (AccordionItem children)

align.description: Specify the alignment of the accordion heading title and chevron

disabled.description: Specify whether an individual AccordionItem should be disabled

isFlush.description: Specify whether Accordion text should be flush, does not work with align="start"

ordered.description: Specify if the Accordion should be an ordered list

size.description: Specify the size of the Accordion

src/lib/components/AccordionItem.react.j.description:
AccordionItem is a wrapper for the Carbon AccordionItem component.
Represents a single collapsible section within an Accordion.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the accordion item

open.description: Whether the accordion item is open

disabled.description: Specify whether an individual AccordionItem should be disabled

src/lib/components/AspectRatio.react.js.description:
AspectRatio is a wrapper for the Carbon AspectRatio component.
Maintains a specific width:height ratio for its content.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the aspect ratio container

ratio.description: Specify the aspect ratio (width:height) to maintain

src/lib/components/Button.react.js.description: Button is a wrapper for the Carbon Button component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

children.description: The content of the button.

className.description: Specify a custom className to be applied to the component.

n_clicks.description: An integer that represents the number of times that this element has been clicked.

n_clicks_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the last click in milliseconds since epoch.

kind.description: Specify the kind of button. Default: 'primary'.

size.description: Specify the size of the button. Default: 'lg'.

isSelected.description: Whether the button is in a selected state.

hasIconOnly.description: Whether the button should only render an icon.

dangerDescription.description: Description for the danger variant (screen readers).

href.description: If provided, renders as a link.

renderIcon.description:
An icon component to render in the button.
Accepts DashIconify, html.Div, Carbon icon name string, or any React node.

aiLabel.description: Whether to render the AI label decorator.

persistence.description: Used to allow user interactions in this component to be persisted.

persisted_props.description: Properties whose user interactions will persist.

persistence_type.description: Where persisted user changes will be stored.

indeterminate.description: Whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state

value.description: The value submitted with the form

clicked.description: Whether the tile has been clicked

href.description: href to render as a link

src/lib/components/CodeSnippet.react.js.description:
CodeSnippet is a wrapper for the Carbon CodeSnippet component.
Displays a block or inline snippet of code with copy functionality.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The code content to be displayed

feedback.description: Specify the string displayed when the snippet is copied

copyButtonDescription.description: Specify the description for the Copy Button

wrapText.description: Specify whether to wrap the text

maxCollapsedNumberOfRows.description: Specify the maximum number of rows to show when collapsed

feedbackTimeout.description: Specify the time it takes for the feedback message to timeout

copyText.description: Optional text to copy. If not specified, children innerText will be used

hideCopyButton.description: Specify whether or not a copy button should be rendered

disabled.description: Specify whether or not the CodeSnippet should be disabled

maxExpandedNumberOfRows.description: Specify the maximum number of rows to show when expanded

src/lib/components/Column.react.js.description:
Column is a wrapper for the Carbon Column component.
Provides responsive column spans for each breakpoint.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the column

as.description: Provide a custom element to render instead of the default div

sm.description: Specify column span for the sm breakpoint (up to 672px, 4 columns)

md.description: Specify column span for the md breakpoint (up to 1056px, 8 columns)

lg.description: Specify column span for the lg breakpoint (up to 1312px, 16 columns)

xlg.description: Specify column span for the xlg breakpoint (up to 1584px, 16 columns)

max.description: Specify column span for the max breakpoint (16 columns)

src/lib/components/ComboButton.react.js.description:
ComboButton is a button with a menu attached for additional actions.
It renders a primary button with a dropdown menu of secondary actions.

Children should be Carbon MenuItem components (e.g., cd.MenuItem(label="Action")).
These can be created using carbon_dash.MenuItem in Python.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the ComboButton (MenuItem components)

label.description: The label text for the primary button

menuAlignment.description: Specify the alignment of the menu relative to the button

tooltipAlignment.description: Specify the alignment of the tooltip

size.description: Specify the size of the button

disabled.description: Specify whether the ComboButton should be disabled

n_clicks.description: Number of times the button has been clicked

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: Alternative content

rows.description: Array of row objects. Each row MUST have a unique `id` string.

headers.description: Array of header configs: {key: string, header: string}

isSortable.description: Allow sorting by clicking column headers

selectedRows.description: Array of selected row IDs (read via Dash callback)

value.description: The current date value(s). For single: string. For range: [start, end]

items.description: List of items to show in the dropdown

decorator.description: Whether to show AI label decorator

belowFold.description: Whether this is the below-fold content

src/lib/components/FluidComboBox.react.j.description: FluidComboBox is a full-width ComboBox component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the combo box

items.description: The items to display in the combo box

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label

titleText.description: Provide the title text for the combo box

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label

placeholder.description: Provide the placeholder text for the combo box

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

allowCustomValue.description: Allow custom values not in the list

size.description: Specify the size of the combo box

direction.description: Specify the direction of the dropdown

src/lib/components/FluidDatePicker.react.description: FluidDatePicker is a full-width DatePicker component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the date picker (DatePickerInput components)

datePickerType.description: Specify the type of date picker

src/lib/components/FluidDatePickerInput..description: FluidDatePickerInput is a full-width date picker input component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the date picker input

placeholder.description: Provide the placeholder text for the date picker input

labelText.description: Provide the label text for the date picker input

pattern.description: Specify the pattern for the date input

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

src/lib/components/FluidDropdown.react.j.description: FluidDropdown is a full-width Dropdown component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the dropdown

items.description: The items to display in the dropdown

label.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label

titleText.description: Provide the title text for the dropdown

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is currently in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is currently in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

size.description: Specify the size of the dropdown

src/lib/components/FluidMultiSelect.reac.description: FluidMultiSelect is a full-width MultiSelect component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the multi select

items.description: The items to display in the multi select

label.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label

titleText.description: Provide the title text for the multi select

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

size.description: Specify the size of the multi select

src/lib/components/FluidNumberInput.reac.description: FluidNumberInput is a full-width number input component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the number input

value.description: The value of the number input

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is currently in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is currently in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

size.description: Specify the size of the number input

src/lib/components/FluidPasswordInput.re.description: FluidPasswordInput is a full-width password input component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the password input

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

placeholder.description: Provide the placeholder text for the password input

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is currently in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is currently in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

src/lib/components/FluidSearch.react.js.description: FluidSearch is a full-width Search component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the search

labelText.description: Provide the label text for the search

placeholder.description: Provide the placeholder text for the search

value.description: The value of the search input

disabled.description: Specify whether the search is disabled

invalid.description: Specify whether the search is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the search is in a warning state

size.description: Specify the size of the search

src/lib/components/FluidSelect.react.js.description: FluidSelect is a full-width Select component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the select (SelectItem components)

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is currently in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is currently in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

size.description: Specify the size of the select

src/lib/components/FluidTextArea.react.j.description: FluidTextArea is a full-width TextArea component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the text area

value.description: The value of the text area

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

placeholder.description: Provide the placeholder text for the text area

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is currently in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is currently in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

readOnly.description: Specify whether the control is read-only

src/lib/components/FluidTextInput.react..description: FluidTextInput is a full-width text input component from Carbon's Fluid components.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the text input

value.description: The value of the text input

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

placeholder.description: Provide the placeholder text for the text input

helperText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is currently in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is currently in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

readOnly.description: Specify whether the control is read-only

size.description: Specify the size of the text input

type.description: Specify the type of the text input

defaultValue.description: Default value for the text input

src/lib/components/FluidTimePicker.react.description: FluidTimePicker is a full-width TimePicker component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the time picker (FluidTimePickerSelect components)

labelText.description: Provide text that is used alongside the control label for additional help

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

invalid.description: Specify whether the control is in an invalid state

invalidText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in an invalid state

warn.description: Specify whether the control is in a warning state

warnText.description: Provide the text that is displayed when the control is in a warning state

src/lib/components/FluidTimePickerSelect.description: FluidTimePickerSelect is a full-width TimePickerSelect component.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the time picker select (SelectItem components)

labelText.description: Provide the label text for the time picker select

disabled.description: Specify whether the control is disabled

src/lib/components/FormItem.react.js.description:
FormItem is a wrapper for the Carbon FormItem component.
Used to group form elements with their labels.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the form item

src/lib/components/Grid.react.js.description:
Grid is a wrapper for the Carbon Grid component.
Provides the top-level grid container for layout.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the grid

condensed.description: Collapse the gutter to 1px. Useful for fluid layouts

fullWidth.description: Remove the default max width the grid has set

narrow.description: Container hangs 16px into the gutter. Useful for typographic alignment

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the header

menuIconDescription.description: Label used for layer navigation with HeaderContainer

isActive.description: Whether the menu button is active

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

children.description: The content of the header name.

href.description: Provide an href for the name to link to.

prefix.description:
Optionally specify a prefix to your header name.
Useful for companies, for example: IBM [Product Name] versus solely [Product Name].

as.description: Provide a custom element or component to render the top-level node for the component.

element.description:
The base element to use to build the link. Defaults to `a`.
@deprecated Use `as` instead.

isSideNavExpanded.description: Property to indicate if the side nav container is open (or not).

src/lib/components/Layer.react.js.description:
Layer provides a stacking context for Carbon components like Tooltips,
Modals, and Dropdowns. Nested layers maintain correct z-index ordering.

level.description: Level of nesting for layer context

href.description: Provide the href for the link

inline.description: Whether the link is inline (default) or standalone

visited.description: Whether to render the visited state

src/lib/components/Loading.react.js.description:
Loading is a wrapper for the Carbon Loading component.
Displays a loading indicator for async operations.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

active.description: Specify whether the loading indicator should be spinning or not

small.description: Specify whether you would like the small variant of Loading

withOverlay.description: Specify whether you want the loader to be applied with an overlay

description.description: Specify a description for the loading state

src/lib/components/MenuItem.react.js.description:
MenuItem is a component for rendering menu items within ComboButton or OverflowMenu.

Usage with ComboButton:
<ComboButton label="Primary action">
  <MenuItem label="Second action" />
  <MenuItem label="Third action" />
</ComboButton>

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

label.description: Specify the label of the menu item

kind.description: Specify the kind of menu item

disabled.description: Specify whether the menu item is disabled

src/lib/components/MenuItemDivider.react.description:
MenuItemDivider is a divider component for use within ComboButton or OverflowMenu.

Usage:
<ComboButton label="Primary action">
  <MenuItem label="Second action" />
  <MenuItemDivider />
  <MenuItem label="Third action" />
</ComboButton>

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

danger.description: Whether the modal is a danger modal

fullWidth.description: Whether the modal should be full width

passiveModal.description: Whether the modal should be passive

preventCloseOnClickOutside.description: Whether to show the close button

shouldSubmitOnEnter.description: Whether the modal should be displayed with a slider

selectorPrimaryFocus.description: Selector for focus on modal open

hideSteppers.description: Whether to hide steppers with mouse event

src/lib/components/Row.react.js.description:
Row is a wrapper for the Carbon Row component.
Provides a grid row container for layout columns.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the row

as.description: Provide a custom element type to render as the outermost element

condensed.description: Collapse the gutter to 1px. Useful for fluid layouts

narrow.description: Container hangs 16px into the gutter. Useful for typographic alignment

value.description: Current value of the search input

invalid.description: Whether the select is in invalid state

warn.description: Whether the select is in warning state

hideLabel.description: Whether the label should be visually hidden

light.description: Whether the label should be lightweight

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

children.description: The content of the side navigation.

ariaLabel.description:
Required props for accessibility label on the underlying menu.
Provide an aria-label.

ariaLabelledBy.description:
Required props for accessibility label on the underlying menu.
Provide an aria-labelledby.

addFocusListeners.description: Specify whether focus and blur listeners are added. They are by default.

addMouseListeners.description: Specify whether mouse entry/exit listeners are added. They are by default.

defaultExpanded.description: If `true`, the SideNav will be open on initial render.

enterDelayMs.description: Specify the duration in milliseconds to delay before displaying the side navigation.

expanded.description:
If `true`, the SideNav will be expanded, otherwise it will be collapsed.
Using this prop causes SideNav to become a controlled component.

href.description: Provide the `href` to the id of the element on your package that is the main content.

isChildOfHeader.description: Specify if sideNav is a child of the header.

isPersistent.description: Specify if the sideNav will be persistent above the lg breakpoint.

isRail.description: Optional prop to display the side nav rail.

onOverlayClick.description: An optional listener that is called when the SideNav overlay is clicked.

onSideNavBlur.description: An optional listener that is called as a callback to collapse the SideNav.

onToggle.description:
An optional listener that is called when an event that would cause
toggling the SideNav occurs.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

children.description: Provide the children to be rendered inside of the SideNavItems.

isSideNavExpanded.description:
Property to indicate if the side nav container is open (or not).
Use to keep local state and styling in step with the SideNav expansion state.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

children.description: Provide SideNavMenuItem's inside of the SideNavMenu.

defaultExpanded.description: Specify whether the menu should default to expanded. By default, it will be closed.

isActive.description:
Specify whether the SideNavMenu is "active".
SideNavMenu should be considered active if one of its menu items are a link for the current page.

isSideNavExpanded.description:
Property to indicate if the side nav container is open (or not).
Use to keep local state and styling in step with the SideNav expansion state.

large.description: Specify if this is a large variation of the SideNavMenu.

renderIcon.description:
An icon component to render in the menu.
Accepts DashIconify, html.Div, Carbon icon name string, or any React node.

tabIndex.description: Optional prop to specify the tabIndex of the button.

title.description: Provide the text for the overall menu name.

data.description: Array of data objects with group/value fields

options.description: Chart options (title, axes, height, colors, etc.)

clickData.description: Data from the last clicked bar

src/lib/components/Stack.react.js.description:
Stack is a wrapper for the Carbon Stack component.
A layout utility that provides consistent spacing between child elements.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the stack

as.description: Provide a custom element type to render as the outermost element

gap.description: Provide either a custom value or a step from the spacing scale to be used as the gap in the layout (1-12)

orientation.description: Specify the orientation of items in the Stack

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the tab

label.description: The label text for the tab

selected.description: Whether the tab is selected. Overrides the parent's selectedIndex

href.description: Provide an href for the tab, making it an <a> element

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: Tab components rendered inside this list

contained.description: Specify whether the tab list should be contained

fullWidth.description: Specify whether the tab list should be full width

ariaLabel.description: Specify the label used for the tab list aria-label

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the panel

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: TabPanel components rendered inside this container

src/lib/components/Tabs.react.js.description:
Tabs is a wrapper for the Carbon Tabs component.
Provides a tabbed interface for organizing content.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the tabs (should contain TabList and TabPanels)

selectedIndex.description: Control which content panel is currently selected

defaultSelectedIndex.description: Specify which content tab should be initially selected when the component is first rendered

dismissable.description: Whether the rendered Tab children should be dismissable

src/lib/components/TextInput.react.js.description:
TextInput is a wrapper for the Carbon TextInput component.
Supports label, placeholder, helper text, invalid/warn states, and AI label decorator.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks

children.description: The content of the text input (used as label fallback if labelText not provided)

readOnly.description: Whether the input is read only

invalid.description: Whether the input is in an invalid state

warn.description: Whether the input is in a warning state

enableCounter.description: Whether to display the character counter

light.description: Whether the label should be lightweight

renderIcon.description: An icon component to render inside the input

aiLabel.description: Whether to render the AI label decorator

onChange.description: Callback for when the input value changes

onBlur.description: Callback for when the input loses focus

dropShadow.description: Whether to show a drop shadow
